violations.text: The floor by the dishwasher is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2026
The floor by the dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2026
Ceiling tiles in the serving side of the cafeteria were observed with water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2025

The floor by the mechanical dishwasher was observed peeling and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment must develop a plan for repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2025
The over flow drainage from the steam cooking unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The floor by the mechanical dishwasher was observed peeling and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment must develop a plan for repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2025

The area between the cooking lines has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
The floor under the 3 bay sink and dishwasher area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Pictures taken. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
The floor under the 3 bay sink and dishwasher area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Pictures taken. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023
